briefdescription.para: This function returns the number of outstanding transactions on a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is the channel number on which the operation is being carried out.

briefdescription.para: This function waits until the outstanding transactions are completed.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is the channel number on which the operation is being carried out.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS when all the pending transactions are complete before timeout. XST_FAILURE if timeout occurs before pending transactions are completed.

briefdescription.para: This function controls the hardware channels of the DPDMA.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is the physical channel number of the DPDMA.
is an enum of type XDpDma_ChannelState.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS when the mentioned channel is enabled successfully. XST_FAILURE when the mentioned channel fails to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the descriptor that is not currently active on a Video/Graphics channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is a pointer to the channel on which the operation is to be carried out.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the address of the descriptor about to be active.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DPDMA instance.
is an enum of the channel for which the descriptor address is to be set.

briefdescription.para: This functions sets the Audio Descriptor for Data Transfer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the descriptor to be initialized
is the payload size of the buffer to be transferred
is the payload address

briefdescription.para: This functions retrieves the configuration for this DPDMA driver and fills in the InstancePtr->Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is a pointer to the configuration structure that will be used to copy the settings from.

briefdescription.para: This functions controls the states in which a channel should go into.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is an enum of XDpDma_ChannelType.
is an enum of type XDpDma_ChannelState.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS when the mentioned channel is enabled successfully. XST_FAILURE when the mentioned channel fails to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function allocates DPDMA Video Channels depending on the number of planes in the video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is the video format to be used for the DPDMA transfer

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS, When the format is valid Video Format. XST_FAILURE, When the format is not valid Video Format

briefdescription.para: This function allocates DPDMA Graphics Channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is the video format to be used for the DPDMA transfer

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS, When the format is a valid Graphics Format. XST_FAILURE, When the format is not valid Graphics Format.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the operation on the a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the driver instance.
is the Quality of Service value to be selected.

briefdescription.para: This function Triggers DPDMA to start the transaction.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpDma instance.
is the XDpDma_ChannelType on which the transaction is to be triggered.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS The channel has successfully been Triggered. XST_FAILURE When the triggering Video and Graphics channel without setting the Video Formats.

briefdescription.para: This function Retriggers DPDMA to fetch data from new descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpDma instance.
is the XDpDma_ChannelType on which the transaction is to be retriggered.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS The channel has successfully been Triggered. XST_FAILURE When the triggering Video and Graphics channel without setting the Video Formats.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes Video Descriptor for Video and Graphics channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the current Descriptor of Video or Graphics Channel.
is a pointer to the Frame Buffer structure

briefdescription.para: This function initializes Descriptors for transactions on Audio Channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpDma_AudioChannel instance
is a pointer to the Audio Buffer structure

briefdescription.para: This function sets the next Frame Buffers to be displayed on the Video Channel.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the instance of DPDMA.
is a pointer to the Frame Buffer structure.
is a pointer to the Frame Buffer structure.
is a pointer to the Frame Buffer structure.

simplesect.para: For interleaved mode use Plane0. For semi-planar mode use Plane0 and Plane1. For planar mode use Plane0, Plane1 and Plane2

briefdescription.para: This function sets the next Frame Buffers to be displayed on the Graphics Channel.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the instance of DPDMA.
is a pointer to the Frame Buffer structure.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the next Audio Buffer to be played on Audio Channel 0.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the instance of DPDMA.
is a pointer to the attributes of the Audio information to be played.
selects between Audio Channel 0 and Audio Channel 1

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS when the play audio request is successful. XST_FAILURE when the play audio request fails, user has to retry to play the audio.
The user has to schedule new audio buffer before half the audio information is consumed by DPDMA to have a seamless playback.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the channel with the latest framebuffer and the available descriptor for transfer on the next Vsync.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the instance of DPDMA.
indicates which channels are being setup for transfer.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the interface functions of the XDpDma driver.

detaileddescription.para: Refer to xdpdma.h for detailed information.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 aad 04/12/16 Initial release. 1.1 aad 04/26/18 Fixed Warnings 1.6 arm 11/27/23 Fixed Coverity Warnings
